title: The Lion of Thebes
writer: Andrey De Coligny, Remigio Del Grosso, Giorgio Ferroni
actors: Mark Forest, Yvonne Furneaux, Massimo Serato
plot: When Troy is destroyed Menelaus and his wife Helen leave for home, but their ships are wrecked. Guided by her protector Arian Helen reaches Egypt and the court of Pharaoh Ramses who wants to marry her but gets entangled in intrigues.
